name: Hadlock estimated-fetal-weight coefficient
tier_rationale: Tier A pending re-review. Source citation: hadlock-1991-fetal-weight. Population: Mixed obstetric ultrasound cohort. Caveats: Specific to the four-parameter Hadlock (1991) formula; alternative formulae have different coefficients.
notes: Lead coefficient of the Hadlock formula log10(EFW) = 1.3596 - 0.00386·AC·FL + 0.0064·HC + ... Caveats: Specific to the four-parameter Hadlock (1991) formula; alternative formulae have different coefficients.
